ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the customer */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Account balance of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "favorite_color" TEXT /* Favorite color of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_favorite_color FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_color") REFERENCES favorite_colors ("hex_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorite_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the color record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the color record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_type_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the link record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_type_links_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_type_links_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer during login */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the customer's device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the login (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the login event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
